findings.evidence: `rg -n "not_isSquare_of_squarefree_of_not_isUnit|TauCeti\.NumberTheory\.Multiquadratic\.Squarefree" code/TauCeti` has no hits after the deletion; the diff removes `TauCeti/NumberTheory/Multiquadratic/Squarefree.lean` entirely.
findings.fix: Keep the old file as a public re-export of `TauCeti.Algebra.Squarefree` and provide a deprecated alias theorem in `namespace TauCeti.Multiquadratic` forwarding to `Squarefree.not_isSquare`.
findings.issue: Deleting this public file and `TauCeti.Multiquadratic.not_isSquare_of_squarefree_of_not_isUnit` breaks downstream imports/users of the existing API while only adding `Squarefree.not_isSquare`.

summary: The new `Squarefree.not_isSquare` surface is appropriately small, but the PR deletes an existing public module/name without a compatibility shim.
